questions.question:
What is the complexity of the following code?

 sum=0;
    for(i=1;i<=n;i*=2)
         for(j=1;j<=n;j++)
            sum++;
Which of the following is not a valid string?

(ISRO CSE 2020)

questions.question:
The time complexity of the following C function is (assume n>0)

 int recursive (int n) {
    if(n == 1)
        return (1);
    else
        return (recursive (n-1) + recursive (n-1));
}


(ISRO CSE 2015)
